details.text: Have you ever suffered/are currently suffering from gestational diabetes, preeclampsia or any other pregnancy related complications?

examples.corrected: Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths

Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swallowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat

Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last 5 years a)Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or prescribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endoscopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test
